task_completion.description: Verify the 'alpha-local' Local Generic repository is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'alpha-local' in the Repositories list or a success notification indicating the repository was created.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'alpha-team' User Group is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'alpha-team' in the Groups list under Identity and Access, or a success notification for its creation.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'alpha-lead' User is created with the correct email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'alpha-lead' in the Users list with the email 'lead@alpha.project'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'alpha-lead' is assigned to the 'alpha-team' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the user details for 'alpha-lead' or group details for 'alpha-team', look for visual confirmation that the user is a member of the group.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'alpha-access' Permission Target is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'alpha-access' in the Permission Targets list.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct permissions are granted to 'alpha-team' for 'alpha-local'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'alpha-access' permission target settings, verify that 'alpha-local' is selected as the repository, 'alpha-team' is added under Groups, and the checkboxes for Read, Annotate, and Deploy/Cache are checked, while Delete and Manage are explicitly unchecked.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the JFrog Artifactory web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the JFrog Artifactory web UI being interacted with in a browser, not terminal windows executing curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent navigated through the actual administration menus.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Administration module menus (Repositories, Identity and Access) being actively used.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't just type the expected outcomes into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs and configurations must be entered into the actual JFrog Artifactory form fields, not a separate text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Repository Name: 'alpha-local'. Group Name: 'alpha-team'. User Name: 'alpha-lead' with email 'lead@alpha.project'. Permission Target Name: 'alpha-access'. Required Permissions for the group on the repo: Read, Annotate, Deploy/Cache. Forbidden Permissions: Delete, Admin/Manage.
